title: T-059 — QA-051 ccp_monitoring page (timeline chart + filter list, parity)
prompt:
# T-059 — QA-051 ccp_monitoring page (parity)

PRD: §8.5 traceability QA-051 ↔ UX QA-014 ↔ prototype `ccp_monitoring`; §11.5 V-QA-CCP-002; §7.1 09-e-06
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/haccp-screens.jsx:109-226 (ccp_monitoring)

## Goal
Server-rendered CCP monitoring page with KPI strip + timeline chart (recharts) + filter list of monitoring records + ccp_reading_modal entry trigger. 1:1 parity vs prototype.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/src/app/quality/ccp/page.tsx (RSC) loads KPIs (activeCCPs, compliance %, deviations 24h) + filtered monitoring records via Drizzle JOIN haccp_monitoring_records JOIN haccp_ccps JOIN haccp_plans.
2. URL searchParams: ?planId=, ?ccpId=, ?dateFrom=, ?dateTo= drive server WHERE clause.
3. Timeline chart = recharts ScatterChart with dots colored by within_limits; ReferenceArea for critical limit band; chart CCP selector controls which CCP's readings render.
4. Table list below chart shows recent records with hazard badge, value, within_limits indicator, recorded_by, recorded_at, signature_hash truncated.
5. 'Add CCP reading' button opens ccp_reading_modal (Client Component) wrapping shadcn Dialog with monitorCcpTick Server Action (T-051).
6. ccp_reading_modal: CCP grouped Select (optgroup by plan), value input with live within_limits preview (client preview; server authoritative), conditional ESignBlock for biological/allergen hazards (V-QA-CCP-005), Auto-NCR + Auto-Hold banner if !within_limits.

## Prototype parity
Anchor: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/haccp-screens.jsx:109-226` (ccp_monitoring).
Parity checklist:
- KPI strip (activeCCPs/compliance/deviations 24h)
- Timeline chart with critical-limit band + colored dots
- Filter bar (plan/CCP/date range)
- Table of recent records
- Add CCP reading button → ccp_reading_modal
- ccp_reading_modal: grouped CCP Select + value input + conditional ESignBlock + auto-NCR/hold notice

## Files
- apps/web/src/app/quality/ccp/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/ccp/CcpKpiStrip.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/ccp/CcpTimelineChart.tsx [create]
- packages/ui/src/quality/CcpReadingModal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/ccp/__tests__/CcpMonitoring.test.tsx [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/haccp-screens.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/haccp-screens.jsx:109-226 — parity on structure (KPI strip + timeline chart + filter bar + table + Add reading button), visuals (shadcn primitives + recharts ScatterChart + ReferenceArea), interaction (URL searchParams drive filters + chart CCP selector + ccp_reading_modal opens) — RTL + checklist
2. Given ?planId + ?ccpId + ?dateFrom + ?dateTo, when page renders, then the timeline chart and table only show records matching those filters; compliance % is server-computed for today (?dateFrom defaulted to start-of-day if absent)
3. Given hazard_type='biological' in ccp_reading_modal, when value entered, then the modal shows an ESignBlock and the Submit button is disabled until PIN verified server-side (per T-039); for hazard_type='physical' the ESignBlock is hidden
4. UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: CcpMonitoring.test.tsx asserting parity + URL-driven filters + compliance server-compute + conditional ESignBlock by hazard_type before implementation
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test CcpMonitoring'
- For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.

## Risk red lines
- compliance % is server-computed only — never client (translation-notes §QA-014)
- ESignBlock is required for biological/allergen — do not let hazard_type bypass (V-QA-CCP-005)
- Do not let client-side recompute within_limits — DB GENERATED authoritative
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim

pipeline_inputs.description: CCP monitoring page (RSC KPI strip + recharts timeline chart + filter list + ccp_reading_modal with conditional ESignBlock). 1:1 parity vs prototype.
pipeline_inputs.details: Server Component loads activeCCPs/compliance%/deviations24h KPI strip (aggregated query) + filtered monitoring records (JOIN haccp_monitoring_records + haccp_ccps + haccp_plans). URL searchParams: planId, ccpId, dateFrom, dateTo. recharts ScatterChart with ReferenceArea for critical limit band; dot color from within_limits. Table below chart shows records. Add CCP reading button opens ccp_reading_modal: grouped CCP Select (optgroup by plan), value input, live within_limits preview (client preview only; server authoritative on submit), conditional ESignBlock for biological/allergen, auto-NCR + auto-hold notice rendered when !within_limits per rule (T-052). Anchor: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/haccp-screens.jsx:109-226.
out_of_scope: Do not implement haccp_deviations table workflows (P2 Epic 8I)
Do not modify CCP Server Actions (T-051) or the rule (T-052)
acceptance_criteria: Given the CCP monitoring page renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/haccp-screens.jsx:109-226 (ccp_monitoring), then it matches on structural parity (KPI strip + timeline chart + filter bar + table + Add-reading button), visual parity (shadcn primitives + recharts ScatterChart/ReferenceArea), and interaction parity (URL searchParams drive filters + chart CCP selector + ccp_reading_modal opens via URL state) — RTL + parity checklist
Given ?planId + ?ccpId + ?dateFrom + ?dateTo, when page renders, then timeline + table show only matching records and compliance % is server-computed
Given hazard_type='biological' in ccp_reading_modal, when value entered, then ESignBlock is rendered and Submit is disabled until server PIN verify; for hazard_type='physical' ESignBlock is hidden

UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.
test_strategy: RED: CcpMonitoring.test.tsx asserting parity + URL filters + compliance server-compute + hazard_type-conditional ESignBlock before implementation
For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.
risk_red_lines: within_limits is DB GENERATED authoritative — no client recompute
Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim
